response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned video to identify scenes. 2. Detected intro sequence followed by a vocal performance starting at 03:32. 3. Identified song title 'Lifetime Showtime' from on-screen text during the performance. 4. Performer is VTuber duo FUWAMOCO. 5. Searched 'Lifetime Showtime FUWAMOCO lyrics'. 6. Resolved metadata and retrieved full lyrics from trusted lyric websites.
response.global_summary: The video features the "FUWAMOCO Wacha Wacha Birthday Festival 2026", showcasing an introduction and a full vocal performance of the song "Lifetime Showtime" by the VTuber duo FUWAMOCO.

scenes.description: The video starts with an intro screen for the 'FUWAMOCO Wacha Wacha Birthday Festival 2026', followed by a montage of various VTuber characters, with upbeat background music.
FUWAMOCO performs their original song 'Lifetime Showtime' on stage at their birthday festival. The performance includes dancing and on-screen lyrics.
